compatibility_notes: portable workspace mode mirrors the exact canonical project schema when direct filesystem access is unavailable
run lint_pack.py, run_regression_suite.py, and validate_project_workspace.py before release
public-facing version strings should match this manifest exactly
legacy v8.2.x history is normalized into the v1.2.x line; this release begins v2.x.x
v2.1.0 adds executable schemas, runtime validation, worked examples, and release packaging gates
v2.2.0 expands direct task coverage, proof artifacts, eval realism, and regression depth

v2.4.0 adds a front-end and back-end capability cluster on top of the stable v2.3 proof and continuity base: front-end architecture, backend systems architecture, deeper accessibility behavior ownership, and API reliability/security.

v2.4.2 adds a generated runtime overlay layer, indexed source-doc section escalation, and capability-preserving low-token hydration rules without removing any canonical skills, routes, summaries, or source docs.
v2.5.0 unifies startup authority, adds degraded-mode behavior, adds visual-input routing support, and adds lightweight execution rules.
v2.5.0 knowledge refresh adds a dedicated digital color library plus stronger typography, localization, and implementation guidance without changing the routed control surface.

v3.0 preserves and extends the source-to-artifact architecture: `src/` as canonical source, `dist/` as operator deployment surface, `docs/` split by audience, and `evals/` plus `proof/` as explicit evidence layers.
v3.0 lightweight path preserves the lean startup path with DEPLOY_LITE, route and contract companions, starter packs, and release-gated lightweight validation.
version_scheme: X.Y public release line (optional internal patch history may exist, but the public pack version can omit the patch suffix)

legacy_version_normalization.rule: legacy v8.2.x release names normalize to v1.2.x for historical reference

version_increment_rules.major_x: breaking compatibility, canonical control/file-system changes, entrypoint changes, or release-line resets
version_increment_rules.minor_y: backward-compatible capability growth such as new skills, validators, templates, materially stronger domain logic, or bundled hardening that ships as one public release line
version_increment_rules.internal_patch_optional: narrow bug fixes, editorial cleanup, metadata corrections, and nonbreaking hardening may exist internally without becoming part of the public pack version string

patch_notes: v3.0: Major release. All v2.9 validator fixes included. positively_present() markdown-aware negation (pass-05 fix). Overclaim rules expanded for directional language (pass-06/07). Test archive reorganised into tests/v2-tests/ with compressed raw outputs. All output paths updated to v2-tests. Version bumped to 3.0 consistently across all pack files. 500+ aliases, 57 evidence token lists, 240+ decision tokens. Kernel heading table. SESSION_ZERO rule 8b. All 6 providers gate-pass (87%) on batch-20260415-0008.
